test_toxic_messages.content: you're literal garbage uninstall the game and never come back nobody wants you here
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Targets a specific person with demeaning language and exclusion. Crosses from trash talk into personal attack by telling someone to leave the community.

test_toxic_messages.content: imagine being this bad at the game lmao i feel sorry for your parents having to raise someone this useless
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Extends from gameplay criticism into personal/family attack. Bringing parents into the insult moves this from competitive banter to harassment.

test_toxic_messages.content: im going to find every lobby you join and make sure you never enjoy a single game again you worthless piece of trash
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Constitutes a direct threat of persistent targeted harassment and intimidation. The promise to follow and harass across lobbies is bullying behavior.

test_toxic_messages.content: of course you play like that, typical [slur] behavior right there cant expect anything better
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Uses a racial/ethnic slur to demean another player based on identity. Zero tolerance violation regardless of context.

test_toxic_messages.content: go back to where you came from [slur] you dont belong in this server or this game
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Combines a discriminatory slur with exclusionary language targeting someone's ethnicity or national origin. Clear hate speech.

test_toxic_messages.content: stop being such a [slur] about it its just a game grow up
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Uses a homophobic slur as a casual insult. Even when not directed at someone's actual orientation, slur usage is a zero-tolerance violation.

test_toxic_messages.content: LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO LETS GOOOOO
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Excessive repetitive text flooding that disrupts conversation flow. Classic spam behavior even if the intent is celebratory.

test_toxic_messages.content: L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L L ratio ratio ratio ratio ratio ratio ratio ratio ratio
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Rapid-fire repetitive characters and words designed to flood the chat. Disrupts normal conversation even if each individual word is harmless.

test_toxic_messages.content: yo everybody come check out my stream twitch.tv/xXsn1perXx im live rn doing ranked grind drop a follow if you want to see some nasty clips
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Self-promotion with a Twitch link posted in a general discussion channel instead of #content-share. Violates the designated channel requirement for promotional content.

test_toxic_messages.content: subscribe to my youtube channel youtube.com/procodplayer for the best BO7 content and guides use code PRO for 10% off gamer supps
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Promotional content with YouTube link and sponsor code posted outside #content-share. Combines self-promotion with commercial advertising.

test_toxic_messages.content: i just datamined the new season 3 weapons and theres a broken AR coming that has zero recoil here are the full stats and attachments
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Sharing datamined unreleased weapon information without spoiler tags and outside of #leaks-spoilers channel.

test_toxic_messages.content: leaked gameplay footage of the new map dropping next season check this out before activision takes it down
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Sharing leaked gameplay footage of unreleased content outside the designated #leaks-spoilers channel without proper spoiler tags.

test_toxic_messages.content: selling iridescent account with all camos unlocked dm me $50 paypal only serious buyers
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Directly advertising account selling with pricing and payment method. Clear violation of the account trading prohibition.

test_toxic_messages.content: anyone need boosting? i can get you from silver to diamond in one session guaranteed $20 per tier dm me for details
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Advertising paid boosting services which modify another player's account rank for money. Falls under account trading and selling services.

test_toxic_messages.content: this new aimbot tool is insane you can get it from [website] its completely undetected right now been using it for weeks in ranked
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Actively promoting and sharing information about cheat software, naming a source, and admitting to using it in ranked play. Critical zero-tolerance violation.

test_toxic_messages.content: bro the walls in this game are so thin i can literally see people through them with this new tool anyone want the download link
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Describing and offering to distribute wallhack software. Promoting cheat tools and offering to share them is a critical violation.

test_toxic_messages.content: gg lets just throw the next two maps so we can drop to losers bracket and get an easier path to finals, the other team already agreed
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Openly discussing match-fixing and intentional losing to manipulate bracket seeding. Collusion with another team constitutes a severe competitive integrity violation.

test_toxic_messages.content: im done with this garbage team im leaving mid series yall can play 3v4 for all i care this whole tournament is rigged anyway
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Announcing intentional disconnect and forfeit during an active tournament match. Ragequitting mid-series constitutes unsportsmanlike behavior and intentional disconnect.

test_toxic_messages.content: LLLLLLLLLLLLL LLLLLLLLLLLLL LLLLLLLLLLLLL cope cope cope cope cope cope LLLLLLLLL seethe seethe seethe seethe ratio ratio ratio ratio
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Repetitive text flooding combining multiple spam patterns. Clearly designed to disrupt the channel rather than contribute to conversation.

test_toxic_messages.content: keep talking tough kid i know what school you go to dont make me post your info in here everyone will know exactly who you are
test_toxic_messages.explanation: Threatening to doxx someone by revealing their school and personal information. While this also implicates Rule 16 (doxxing), the primary violation is the threatening and intimidating nature directed at a specific person, constituting severe harassment.
